results.rendered_html:
asatya (3. a + sa˚)
1〉 adj. f. ā unwahr, trügerisch: pāpāsaḥ santo anṛtā asatyāḥ  ṚV. 4,5,5 . śaṃyorapratimā bhāryā satyāsatyātha dharmajā  MBH. 3,14133 .
— 2〉 n. Unwahrheit  H. 265 , Sch. asatyasya ca bhāṣaṇam  M. 11,69 . Trug: yadatra satyaṃ vāsatyaṃ vā gatvā vetsyāmi niścayam  N. 19,8 .

results.rendered_html:
asatya a.
1 Untrue, false.
2 Imaginary, unreal; asatyakaṃṭhārpitabāhubaṃdhanā  Ku. 5. 57. 
— tyaḥ A liar.
— tyaṃ Falsehood, untruth.
Comp.
— vādin a. speaking falsely, liar.
— saṃdha a. not true to one's promise, false,
(pb) perfidious, treacherous; ˚dhe jane sakhī padaṃ kāritā  Ś. 4. 
— sannibha a. improbable, unlikely.
